case_title: HAL 347 EDDY SF, LLC VS. SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION et al
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION FILED BY RESPONDENT SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND ARBITRATION BOARD CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER HAL 347 EDDY SF, LLC'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS AND COMPLAINT FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 10, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. THE RESPONDENT SHALL PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE OPPOSITION AND THE PETITIONER SHALL PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE REPLY WITH DEPT. 302 BY DECEMBER 7 PER SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE PARTIES SHALL PLEASE ATTACH A COVER LETTER TO THOSE PAPERS INDICATING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
SUMMONS ISSUED (AMENDED) TO PETITIONER HAL 347 EDDY SF, LLC

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER HAL 347 EDDY SF, LLC'S NOTICE ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS AND COMPLAINT FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF SET FOR JAN-10-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR PER THE RENOTICE SETTING THE MATTER IN DEPT. 501.

MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-03-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION, 501, PETITIONER HAL 347 EDDY SF, LLC'S RE-NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. BOTH PARTIES PREPARE STATEMENT OF DECISION. JUDGE RONALD E QUIDACHAY, CLERK K. LIU, CSR BARRIE HART.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PETITIONER HAL 347 EDDY SF, LLC'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS WAS HEARD AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON DEC-03-2012. COURT DENIES THE PETITION. PARTIES ARE TO PREPARE A JOINT STATEMENT OF DECISION. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: PETITIONER HAL 347 EDDY SF, LLC SHALL TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENTS SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT STABLIZATION AND ARBITRATION BOARD AND CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. RESPONDENTS SHALL RECOVER THEIR COSTS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

calendar.matters:
Notice On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus And Complaint For Declaratory Relief
Off Calendar Dec-11-2012 Off Calendar

Notice On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus And Complaint For Declaratory Relief
Off Calendar Dec-03-2012 Continued To Jan-10-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER HAL 347 EDDY SF, LLC'S Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus And Complaint For Declaratory Relief is continued to January 10, 2013. The respondent shall provide a courtesy copy of the opposition and the petitioner shall provide a courtesy copy of the reply with department 302 by December 7 per San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The parties shall please attach a cover letter to those papers indicating the new hearing date. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

(Re-Notice) Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Dec-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. David Wasserman of Wasserman-Stern (415-567-9600) appearing for petitioner Hal 347 Eddy SF, LLC moving party.
Atty. Wayne Kessler Snodgrass of Office of the City Attorney (415-554-4675)appearing for respondent S.F. Residential Rent Stabilization.

Argued- Court having reviewed the pleadings and have heard oral argument. PETITIONER HAL 347 EDDY SF, LLC's Re-Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus is taken under submission. Both parties prepare statement of decision. Judge Ronald E Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, CSR Barrie Hart (415-328-6644).
